monitor.title: OpenClaw Live Monitor
monitor.detectFailed: Monitor detection failed, click to configure manually
monitor.notInstalled: No local monitor detected, click to install/connect
monitor.error: Detection failed. You can still input URL manually.
monitor.missing: Star Office is not detected on this machine.
monitor.assistPromptInstalled: Local Star Office service is detected ({{url}}). Enter "connect and usage guidance" mode directly: 1) confirm detection in one sentence; 2) guide me to click the TV icon and confirm URL; 3) explain Star Office + OpenClaw workflows; 4) if connection fails, run shortest diagnosis (port/process/logs) and retry.
monitor.installPrompt: User has authorized you to auto-run Star Office install/repair commands in this conversation (minimize manual shell input). Execute now: environment check -> auto install/repair (project: https://github.com/ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI) -> start service -> detect port -> guide clicking TV icon to verify. Only ask user when OS-level permission is strictly required.
monitor.diagnosePrompt: Enter Star Office connection diagnosis mode (prefer no reinstall): check port conflicts, process status, auth/token, health checks and logs first; perform shortest fix automatically; re-detect and guide me to verify via TV icon.
monitor.visualDesc: Star Office is a visual companion for OpenClaw. It turns chat-side status into a live, interactive monitor view.
monitor.visualFallbackDesc: OpenClaw chat status becomes a visual office scene.
monitor.visualImageCaptionFallback: Preview image unavailable, open project for full screenshots.
monitor.hint: Input monitor URL manually, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:19000
